caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SMTH" sits in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background, including a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the lower left of the scene, a logo reads "TOWNY" and in the lower right, red text reads "PROUDLY FOR". Throughout the clip, the man is speaking, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze moving. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the man from the chest up as he engages in conversation.
